subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1900
subcodes.first_line: We had these flower last year and today we see the same. We are in the habit of saying these flowers are the return
subcodes.subjects: @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @suffering; rejection of Christ, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @return of the Manifestations of God, @rejection of Muhammad
